Record Class TrendKpi

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.project.model.TrendKpi
public record TrendKpi(int totalSold, String mostPopularDrink, String peakOrderingTime) extends Record
Immutable record representing key performance indicators for sales trends.

This record contains aggregated KPI data including total items sold, the most popular drink, and peak ordering time window.

  • Constructor Summary

    • TrendKpi

      public TrendKpi(int totalSold, String mostPopularDrink, String peakOrderingTime)
      Creates an instance of a TrendKpi record class.
      Parameters:
      totalSold - the value for the totalSold record component
      mostPopularDrink - the value for the mostPopularDrink record component
      peakOrderingTime - the value for the peakOrderingTime record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • totalSold

      public int totalSold()
      Returns the value of the totalSold record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the totalSold record component

      public String mostPopularDrink()
      Returns the value of the mostPopularDrink record component.
      Returns:

      Returns:
      the value of the peakOrderingTime record component
